title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
summary: JavaGuide 是一个全面的 Java 面试与后端开发指南，涵盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式系统、高并发、系统设计及 AI 应用开发等核心主题。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有超过 15.7 万星标，涉及 agent、AI、上下文工程、DeepSeek、MCP、Spring AI 等前沿技术，是 Java 开发者准备面试和提升后端技能的宝贵资源。
summary_en: JavaGuide is a comprehensive guide for Java interviews and backend development, covering computer fundamentals, databases, distributed systems, high concurrency, system design, and AI application development. With over 157k stars on GitHub, it includes topics such as agent, AI, context engineering, DeepSeek, MCP, Spring AI, making it a valuable resource for Java developers preparing for interviews and enhancing backend skills.
